title: o7 fp-verdicts overlay
description: Machine encoding of the DOMAIN contract at OwnAudit/docs/fp-judge/verdict-contract.md — that file is the source of truth; keep this in sync. Seam: 007 owns this file + the mechanism; the domain owns finding identity + required fields.

generated_from.description: sha256 of the exact findings.json this overlay was judged against. The report refuses to merge if it != the current findings.json (staleness guard).

verdicts.description: keyed by finding_id = sha1(path + 0x1f + rule + 0x1f + message).hexdigest()[:16] — line-independent. One id may cover >1 physical findings (identical message, different lines).

evidence.description: optional but wanted: teardown site (:line) or the deciding fact
